content.text:
Added the three missing hints to the `s1` hints array:
- `HttpResponse` — referenced via `setContentType` and `setContentDisposition` in the action implementation notes
- `CsvDataBindConfig` — appears in the DTO code block (`CsvDataBindConfig.QuoteMode.NORMAL`)
- `ApplicationException` — appears in the `@OnError` annotation in the action code block
